LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ERLINDA SEVILLA'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ON APRIL 29, 2013, THE COURT ORDERED THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS PAPERS AND WARNED THAT THE FAILURE TO DO SO COULD RESULT IN THE MOTION BEING DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ERLINDA SEVILLA's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment is denied without prejudice. On April 29, 2013, the Court ordered the moving party to provide courtesy copies of its papers and warned that the failure to do so could result in the motion being denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Continued To May-09-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ERLINDA SEVILLA'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is continued on the court's own motion to May 9, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Ms. Sevilla the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Ms. Sevilla must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 29, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
